judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical skin-exposure actions and order: remove contaminated clothing/shoes, rinse skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, then contact a doctor/poison control immediately. It also preserves the do-not rule and escalation timing without adding unsupported advice.
